data.name: IamError.UserAlreadyExists
data.value: A user with this email already exists.

data.name: IamError.UserCreationFailed
data.value: An error occurred while creating the user.

data.name: IamError.UserUpdateFailed
data.value: An error occurred while updating the user.

data.name: IamError.AdminAlreadyExists
data.value: An admin for this user already exists.

data.name: IamError.AdminCreationFailed
data.value: An error occurred while creating the admin.

data.name: IamError.AdminUpdateFailed
data.value: An error occurred while updating the admin.
